## Checklist

- [ ] Types are explicit — no unintentional `any`
- [ ] New public behavior is covered by tests
- [ ] Documentation updated if user-facing behavior changed
- [ ] Attribution notices (`LICENSE`, `src/attribution.ts`, docs) not removed or bypassed
